data.title: This Top Chip-Gear Stock Has Positive Catalysts Ahead, Citi Says
data.description: Citi, an investment bank, has initiated a 90-day positive catalyst watch on Advanced Energy Industries. Despite this, the stock of AEIS experienced a decline on Friday. According to Citi, this top chip-gear stock is expected to have positive catalysts in the future.

data.title: Rhythm Surges On A New Obesity Approval; How It Edged In Where Lilly, Novo 'Have Fallen Flat'
data.description: Rhythm Pharmaceuticals experienced a significant increase in its stock price on Friday following FDA approval of its obesity drug for individuals with a rare condition that increases hunger. The approval marked a positive development for the company, with its stock surging after the announcement. This achievement by Rhythm Pharmaceuticals highlights a successful venture into a market where competitors such as Lilly and Novo have faced challenges.

data.title: This Chinese EV Brand Just Reported Its First-Ever Quarterly Profit
data.description: Despite the positive development of a first-ever quarterly profit for a Chinese EV brand, the anticipation for 2026 appears lackluster. This brand experienced a significant milestone by achieving profitability in a quarter for the first time.

data.title: This Former Highflier Nears Buy Point As Activist Investor Eyes Stock Boost
data.description: Recently, it was reported that Elliott Investment Management has purchased a substantial share in Align Technology. The investment firm's move was highlighted by Bloomberg. This acquisition has stirred interest as the company approaches a potential buy point, with an activist investor looking to boost its stock value. The details suggest a strategic maneuver by Elliott Investment Management to capitalize on the potential growth of Align Technology within the market. This development emphasizes the evolving dynamics in the financial sector, showcasing the impact of key players on stock performance.

data.title: Crypto is integral to Canada’s financial system, facing regulatory changes. Gov adopts risk-management approach in past year.
data.description: In the past year, the crypto sector has experienced several regulatory shifts, notably in Canada where the government has adopted a cautious attitude focused on risk management and prioritizing rules and guidelines.

data.title: BCH price could hit $482 resistance by month-end, currently trading at $466.70 with RSI at 46.53. Momentum looks bullish.
data.description: The current trading price of Bitcoin Cash stands at $466.70, accompanied by a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 46.53. Analysis indicates that if market momentum turns in favor, BCH may potentially reach a resistance level of $482 in the coming weeks.

data.title: Dormant $147M Bitcoin whale wakes up after 13 years, transfers mere $56.
data.description: Recently, a Bitcoin wallet that had been dormant since 2012 has been activated, with only $56 worth of BTC being moved from the wallet. This wallet currently holds a value of approximately $147 million.

data.title: Orion Corporation: Disclosure Under Chapter 9 Section 10 of the Securities Market Act (BlackRock, Inc.)
data.description: On March 20, 2026, at 15:40 EET, Orion Corporation released a statement regarding changes in its major shareholder composition. The announcement detailed significant developments in the corporation's stock holdings. This update underscores the evolving landscape of shareholders in the company, suggesting potential shifts in ownership and influence. The disclosure highlights the importance of monitoring major shareholder announcements for insights into the dynamics of corporate governance and investment patterns. Such information is crucial for investors and stakeholders seeking to understand the underlying trends shaping the company's trajectory and strategic decision-making.

data.title: LINK price expected to reach $10.50 by March-end. Short-term target $9.50. Medium-term forecast $9.50-$10.50. Support at $8.73.
data.description: The predicted price for LINK in the short-term (1 week) is $9.50, while in the medium-term (1 month) it is expected to range between $9.50 and $10.50. The bullish breakout level is set at $10.50, with a critical support level identified at $8.73.

data.title: Bitcoin's RSI signals nearing critical point for potential bullish trend, requiring higher low to continue.
data.description: The Bitcoin Relative Strength Index (RSI) signals are on the verge of a crucial point, with analysts suggesting that a higher low is necessary to sustain the bullish price momentum of BTC. This development underscores the significance of assessing market sentiment accurately to navigate the cryptocurrency landscape effectively. As Bitcoin's value hovers around ${VALUE}, investors are closely monitoring these RSI indicators to gauge potential price movements and make informed decisions regarding their digital asset portfolios.
